hooks.description: Remind about access rules when a new Python model file is created

action.message:
[odoo-security] New model file created. Verify security:
- Every model class needs a row in security/ir.model.access.csv
- Format: access_mymodel_user,my.model.user,model_my_model,base.group_user,1,1,1,0
- TransientModel (wizards) also need access rules (perm_create=1, perm_unlink=1)
- Run /check-access to audit all models automatically

hooks.description: Remind to check sudo() usage when a model file is modified

action.message:
[odoo-security] Model file modified. Check:
- New sudo() calls are justified with a comment explaining why
- Computed fields with sudo() store=True expose data in reports
- Use sudo().with_context() to limit the scope of privilege escalation
- Run /find-sudo to classify all sudo() calls by risk level

hooks.description: Remind about route authentication when a new controller file is created

action.message:
[odoo-security] New controller file created. Verify routes:
- Every @http.route() has explicit auth= parameter (public, user, or none)
- State-changing routes (POST) have csrf=True (default) or are API routes
- Sensitive data routes use auth='user' not auth='public'
- Run /check-routes to audit all route authentication

hooks.description: Remind about CSRF and auth when a controller file is modified

action.message:
[odoo-security] Controller file modified. Check new/modified routes:
- auth='public' endpoints must not expose private user data
- csrf=False requires explicit justification (REST APIs use type='json')
- Rate limiting: consider sudo() + domain check for public POST endpoints
- Run /check-routes for a full route audit report

hooks.description: Remind to validate access CSV completeness after any change

action.message:
[odoo-security] ir.model.access.csv modified. Validate:
- model_id:id format: model_my_model_name (replace dots with underscores, prepend model_)
- group_id:id must reference an existing group or be empty (allows all authenticated users)
- Permissions: perm_read, perm_write, perm_create, perm_unlink (1 or 0)
- Run /check-access to find any models still missing access rules

hooks.description: Remind about TransientModel access rules when a wizard file is created

action.message:
[odoo-security] New wizard file created. TransientModel access rules:
- Wizards (TransientModel) require ir.model.access.csv entries
- Minimum: perm_read=1, perm_write=1, perm_create=1, perm_unlink=1
- Add entry BEFORE the group that uses the wizard action
- Run /check-access to verify the wizard is covered

hooks.description: Remind about security file ordering in manifest data array

action.message:
[odoo-security] Manifest modified. Verify security file order in 'data' array:
1. security/group_*.xml (user groups, must be first)
2. security/ir.model.access.csv (model permissions)
3. security/rules_*.xml (record-level rules)
- Wrong order causes install errors: 'group referenced before it is defined'
- Run /security-audit for a full security analysis
